title_en: 4. Humil ity Towards One Who Is of A Lesser Status and Helping Him
content_en: It was narrated t hat Al-Bara' ibn 'Aazib ~ said : The Prophet ~ was moving soil with us on the day of AI-Ahzaab, and I saw him with dust covering the whiteness of his stomach, and he (the Prophet ~ ) was saying, "{O Allaah)! Without You, we would not have been guided, nor would we have given in charity, nor would we have prayed. So {O Allaah!) send tranquillity {Sakeenah) upon us as they (the chiefs of the enemy tribes) have rebelled against us. And if they intend affliction (i.e. want to frighten us and fight against us) then we would not (flee but would withstand them)." And he raised his voice whilst saying it." (Narrated by AI-Bukhaaree, 6809; Muslim, 1803) 5. Humility in Interactions With One's Wife and Helping Her It was narrated that AI-Aswad said: " I asked 'Aa'ishah what the Prophet i1i; used to do in his house, and she said: He used to serve his family and when the time for prayer came he would go out and pray." AI-Bukhaaree, 644. AI-Haafiz lbn Hajar ..ti '-s"-J said: " This shows that we are encouraged to be humble and not arrogant, and that a man should serve his family." [Fath Al-Baari, 2/163]
title_id: Rendah Hati kepada Yang Lebih Rendah Status dan Membantu Mereka
content_id:
Di antara nasihat Luqman kepada putranya adalah perintah untuk bersikap rendah hati kepada semua orang tanpa memandang status sosial mereka. Kerendahhatian adalah tanda keimanan yang benar, sementara kesombongan adalah sifat yang dibenci Allah dan Rasul-Nya.

Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidaklah seseorang merendahkan dirinya karena Allah melainkan Allah akan meninggikannya." Kerendahhatiann kepada orang yang lebih rendah status — kaum fakir, orang-orang lemah, para pelayan — adalah ujian nyata bagi karakter seorang Muslim. Luqman mengajarkan putranya bahwa kemuliaan sejati bukan terletak pada harta dan kedudukan, melainkan pada keimanan dan ketakwaan kepada Allah.

Membantu orang lain — terutama mereka yang membutuhkan — adalah ibadah. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Dan Allah senantiasa menolong hamba-Nya selama hamba itu menolong saudaranya."
content_ar: It was narrated t hat Al-Bara' ibn 'Aazib ~ said : النبي ﷺ ~ was moving soil with us on the day of AI-Ahzaab, and I saw him with dust covering the whiteness of his stomach, and he (النبي ﷺ ~ ) was saying, "{O Allaah)! Without You, we would not have been guided, nor would we have given in الصدقة, nor would we have prayed. لذا {O Allaah!) send tranquillity {Sakeenah) upon us as they (the chiefs of the enemy tribes) have rebelled against us. And إذا they intend affliction (i.e. want to frighten us and fight against us) then we would not (flee but would withstand them)." And he raised his voice whilst saying it." (Narrated by AI-Bukhaaree, 6809; مسلم, 1803) 5. التواضع in Interactions With One's الزوجة and Helping Her روي أنه AI-Aswad said: " I asked 'عائشة what النبي ﷺ i1i; used to do in his house, and sقال: He used to serve his الأسرة and عندما the time for الصلاة came he would go out and pray." AI-Bukhaaree, 644. AI-Haafiz lbn Hajar ..ti '-s"-J said: " This shows that we are encouraged to be humble and not arrogant, and that a man should serve his الأسرة." [Fath Al-Baari, 2/163]
